notable_phrases: we're constrained today on several models of the iPhone 17
we expect to return to growth this quarter
summary: Apple reported record Q4 results with strong iPhone 17 demand creating supply constraints, robust services growth accelerating to 15%, and confident guidance for best-ever December quarter despite China weakness and tariff headwinds.
